description_long: This is a rectangular wooden cabinet with a rich, dark brown finish and a flat top surface. The front features three open cubby shelves along the upper row and three lower compartments, each with a small round knob, likely functioning as doors or drawers. The sides are plain and flat, while the back is a solid, unadorned wooden panel. The cabinet stands on four short legs, slightly elevating it above the ground. Its design is simple and functional, suitable for use as a media console, storage unit, or display shelf in urban environments such as living rooms, offices, or waiting areas.
description: A dark brown wooden cabinet with three open shelves and three lower compartments with knobs, standing on short legs. Its simple, functional design makes it suitable for storage or display in urban settings.
description_view_0: Side view showing the flat, plain wooden panel and the thickness of the cabinet.
description_view_1: Front view displaying three open shelves above three lower compartments with knobs, highlighting the main interactive features.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, showing the plain wooden side panel.
description_view_3: Rear view showing a solid, unadorned wooden back panel with no openings or features.
